name: Elbmesh Review Change
title: Review an Elbmesh Change
summary: Review Elbmesh changes for bugs, missing tests, Rust quality, documentation drift, and architecture boundary violations.
description: Use this task for completed or proposed Elbmesh changes before claiming completion or merge readiness.

validations.title: Review output shape
criteria: Findings are listed first and ordered by severity with file/line references where possible.
If no findings are found, residual risks and testing gaps are stated explicitly.

items: Resource/Action/Event boundaries and one-Resource Action target rule.
Typed errors, Receipts, metadata, schema versions, and expected version handling.
Event/journal separation across Action Journal, Operation Journal, Reaction Journal, and Resource streams.
External Operation declaration, idempotency, and absence of hidden external calls in replay/apply.
Reaction execution through Actions and View rebuildability from Events.
Manifest contract consistency and generated-doc/skill drift where relevant.
Missing failing tests, weakened tests, or unplanned scope.

criteria.text: Findings are reported first, ordered by severity, with concrete file/line references where possible.
The review explicitly covers Elbmesh Resource, Action, Event, Reaction, External Operation, View, Query, journal, manifest, and trace boundaries that are relevant to the changed files.
Test coverage and verification evidence are assessed, including missing or infeasible checks.
